rationale: In the citing paper, Soman and Cheema (2011) appears only in a grouped citation as an example of prior work on the wealth-accumulation stage (retirement savings decisions), contrasted with the paper's focus on decumulation and annuities. The citation is not tied to hypothesis development, model specification, measures, or interpretation of the annuity results. It functions as broad background positioning rather than a meaningful building block for the study.
